name: Verity, Inc.
description: Verity is a leading provider of investment research management software and data analytics solutions designed for global institutional investors. The company offers a comprehensive platform that helps investment firms generate alpha, improve research workflows, enhance portfolio monitoring, and reduce risk. Serving over 300 institutional clients, including public equity, fixed income, and private equity firms, Verity provides high-integrity datasets and expert analysis. Recently acquired by TMX Group, Verity continues to deliver innovative technology and intelligence to help asset managers standardize their research processes and make more informed investment decisions.
